title: Route
description: A Route is the URL pattern that resolves to a Page. It maps a path to a Resource page.

path.description: The URL path pattern for this route.

page.description: The Page name this route resolves to.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this route represents.

layout.description: The Layout name to wrap this route's page in.

protected.description: When true, the route requires authentication.
